candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate top-line revenue total with identical values; useful as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Both rows represent the same top line. Using them as a priority list, not a sum.

candidates.why: Explicit COGS label and matches Production Costs values exactly.
Also appears to be the direct cost line, but the explicit COGS label is more precise.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Selected the explicit COGS row rather than the duplicate 'Production Costs' label.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row exists, but appears empty in preview; include per rule for coverage across years.
Dedicated R&D operating expense above EBIT; included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Clear SG&A overhead component above EBIT.
Clear SG&A overhead component above EBIT.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty in the preview, so included it plus the main overhead buckets for coverage. Included 'Development costs' because it is a separate above-EBIT R&D line and should also be in XSGA so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD excludes R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D-type expense line above EBIT; best primary R&D mapping.
Supplemental R&D disclosure, but below the main statement and less preferred than the operating line.

variables.notes: Chose the dedicated above-EBIT operating R&D line.

candidates.why: Recurring financing cost related to leases.
Recurring finance cost component; preferable to total finance cost when excluding FX/fair value items.
Contains broader items including exchange losses/fair value items, so less preferred than granular recurring components.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded exchange-rate and fair-value items to avoid non-interest financial noise.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent/owners' equity line is shown.
Equivalent total line, but less preferred than the standard total equity label.

variables.notes: No separate parent-equity line is available. Per rule, using 'Total Equity' and setting MIB to empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Direct non-controlling interest label exists, but not needed when BE uses Total Equity and no separate owner-equity line is available.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Set to empty because BE uses 'Total Equity' and there is no separate parent-equity line; this avoids double counting non-controlling interests.
